name: Potato Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and mash medium potatoes without seasoning, butter, or milk.
2. Measure 1/3 cup mashed potatoes.
3. Melt chocolate and butter together.
4. Blend the melted mixture into the mashed potatoes with salt and vanilla.
5. Mix well until smooth.
6. Sift confectioners' sugar.
7. Add sugar a small amount at a time, blending until no sugar is visible.
8. When a spoon can no longer mix the batter, knead the remaining sugar into the mixture using well-buttered hands.
9. Turn out onto a floured board and continue to knead until the mixture is smooth, glossy, and pliable.
10. Shape into balls or press into a buttered 8-inch square pan topped with nutmeats.
11. Makes about 1 1/4 pounds of potato chocolate fudge.
